problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: If Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts is applied to chemical, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
